description.value:
Archetype

You hunt with instinctive coordination, exploiting openings that your allies create. You gain the following benefits while your Devil Fruit is not suppressed:

  • You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to attack rolls against creatures that are within reach of at least one of your allies.
  • When you critically hit a creature that is Frightened, it must succeed at a Fortitude save (your class DC) or become Stunned 1.
description.gm: The +2 circumstance bonus is stronger than flanking (+2 circumstance) but applies even without flanking geometry — appropriate for a high-level Zoan feat. The Stunned-on-crit-against-Frightened synergises with Savage Howl and Howl of Dread.
